summary: Session 20 testing complete. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) Jest suite 174/174 tests passing (+13 gallery tests), (2) GET /api/gallery public endpoint returns {items, count, limit, offset} with correct filtering, (3) /gallery page renders without auth - shows empty state with 'Build the first one' CTA, (4) LoginPage has 'or explore apps built by the community' link (data-testid='landing-gallery-link') pointing to /gallery, (5) ProjectHub has Publish button (data-testid='hub-publish-btn') for non-core projects, (6) PublishModal opens with Publish/Cancel buttons (data-testid='publish-modal-publish', 'publish-modal-cancel'), (7) Versions and Backend buttons still present in ProjectHub topbar.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Jest suite 174/174 tests passing across 15 test files (+13 new gallery tests)
PASS: GET /api/gallery returns {items, count, limit, offset} - public endpoint (no auth required)
PASS: Gallery filters out projects without share_token and expired share tokens
PASS: Gallery respects limit (capped at 60) and offset query params
PASS: POST /api/projects/{id}/publish returns 401 unauth, 403 not-owner, 404 missing, 400 no-files
PASS: Publish endpoint mints never-expiring share token if none exists, reuses existing
PASS: Publish endpoint sets settings.is_public=true and settings.published_at
PASS: POST /api/projects/{id}/unpublish removes is_public and published_at, keeps share token valid
PASS: /gallery page renders without auth (data-testid='gallery-page')
PASS: Gallery page shows loading state (data-testid='gallery-loading')
PASS: Gallery page shows empty state (data-testid='gallery-empty') with 'Build the first one' CTA
PASS: Gallery header has Back link (data-testid='gallery-back-home') and 'Build your own' CTA (data-testid='gallery-build-cta')
PASS: LoginPage has gallery link (data-testid='landing-gallery-link') with text 'or explore apps built by the community →'
PASS: Gallery link correctly points to /gallery
PASS: ProjectHub has Publish button (data-testid='hub-publish-btn') for non-core projects
PASS: Publish button shows 'Publish' for unpublished projects
PASS: PublishModal opens (data-testid='publish-modal') with correct elements
PASS: Modal has Publish button (data-testid='publish-modal-publish')
PASS: Modal has Cancel button (data-testid='publish-modal-cancel')
PASS: Modal has close button (data-testid='publish-modal-close')
PASS: Versions button (hub-versions-btn) still present in ProjectHub topbar
PASS: Backend button (hub-backend-btn) still present in ProjectHub topbar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 20 complete. Public gallery feature added: (1) GET /api/gallery returns public projects with share tokens, (2) POST /api/projects/{id}/publish marks project public and mints share token, (3) POST /api/projects/{id}/unpublish hides from gallery but keeps share URL valid, (4) /gallery page is public (no auth) with empty/loading/grid states, (5) LoginPage has gallery discovery link, (6) ProjectHub has Publish button + PublishModal for non-core projects. Jest suite at 174/174 tests across 15 test files. The test account (REDACTED_LEAKED_USER) has projects that can be published to test the full flow.

login_page.gallery_link_text: or explore apps built by the community →
